auth.signInSubtitle: From a glance to a conversation
auth.signUpSubtitle: Join the social layer of real life
auth.signInHint: Sign in to see who's around you right now
auth.signUpHint: Create an account to connect with people at your favorite spots
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.whySignUp: Your account keeps your chats and connections safe across devices

profile.createSubtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself
profile.nicknameHint: This is how others will see you. You can change it anytime.
profile.ageRangeHint: Helps people find others in their age group
profile.interestsHint: Pick up to 5 interests — we'll highlight what you have in common with others
profile.languageHint: Switch the app language between English and Russian
profile.editProfileHint: Update your nickname, age range, or interests
profile.tokenBalanceHint: Earn tokens by checking in and participating in activities. Spend them to boost visibility or join premium activities.
profile.changeAvatarHint: Tap your photo to pick a new one from your gallery
profile.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure? This action is irreversible. All your data, chats, and connections will be permanently deleted.
profile.visibilityHint: When visible, others can see you in the venue's people list
profile.visibilityOffHint: You're hidden — no one can see you or send you waves
profile.statusTagHint: Let others know what you're up for — this shows next to your name
profile.settingsHint: Manage privacy, appearance, and account settings
profile.profileCompleteness: Complete your profile to get more connections
profile.tapToViewTokens: Tap to view balance and transaction history

map.discoverHint: Find bars, clubs, and spots where people are hanging out right now
map.noVenuesHint: Try zooming out or check back later — new venues are added regularly
map.tapVenueHint: Tap a venue on the map to see details and check in
map.qrScanHint: Scan the QR code at the venue to check in instantly
map.activeCheckinHint: You're checked in — tap to return to your venue
map.scrollVenuesHint: Scroll cards to explore nearby venues

venue.checkinHint: Check in to see who's here and start meeting people
venue.checkoutHint: Leave this venue — your chats will expire in 24 hours
venue.peopleHint: See who's here right now and send a wave to connect
venue.chatHint: Join the general venue chat — everyone checked in can see it
venue.activitiesHint: Polls, games, and challenges happening right now
venue.scanQRHint: Point your camera at the QR code displayed at the venue
venue.checkedInHint: Explore people, chat, and join activities while you're here
venue.checkedInElsewhere: You're checked in at another venue
venue.checkedInElsewhereHint: Check out from your current venue first to check in here
venue.zonesHint: This venue has different areas — check where the action is
venue.venueInfoHint: Venue details, location, and what's happening inside
venue.waveExplain: A wave lets them know you're interested — if they wave back, you can chat!
venue.activitiesEmptyHint: Activities will appear here when the venue or other users create them
venue.checkoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave? Your venue chats will expire in 24 hours.

chats.emptyHint: Check in to a venue and start meeting people around you
chats.emptyStep1: 1. Find a venue on the map
chats.emptyStep2: 2. Check in by scanning the QR code
chats.emptyStep3: 3. Send a wave to someone you'd like to chat with
chats.microChatHint: 5 min · 10 messages — a quick way to break the ice
chats.microChatExplain: Micro-chats are short and sweet — if you hit it off, extend the chat with tokens
chats.ephemeralNotice: This chat expires 24h after you leave the venue
chats.directChatHint: This is a private chat — only you two can see it
chats.venueChatHint: Everyone checked in at this venue can see and send messages here

hint.wantToChat: Open to meeting new people and having a conversation
hint.lookingForCompany: Looking for someone to hang out with
hint.playing: Currently playing a game and open to challengers
hint.listening: Enjoying the music — feel free to say hi
hint.lookingForDancePartner: Looking for someone to hit the dance floor with
hint.justChilling: Relaxing, but still open to a chat

safety.blockHint: This person won't be able to see you or send you messages
safety.reportHint: Let us know if someone is behaving inappropriately — reports are anonymous
safety.reportSent: Report sent. Thank you for keeping EyesTalk safe!
safety.blockConfirm: Are you sure you want to block this user? They won't know they've been blocked.
safety.reportReasonHint: Select the reason that best describes the issue
safety.reportDescriptionHint: Add any extra details that might help us review this report

tokens.historyHint: See how you earned and spent your tokens
tokens.emptyHistoryHint: Check in to a venue to earn your first tokens!
tokens.earnCheckin: Check in to a venue → +10 tokens

microChat.expiredHint: Want to keep talking? Extend the chat with tokens
microChat.extendedHint: You have 5 more minutes and 10 more messages

icebreakers.title: Break the ice!
icebreakers.hint: Pick a question to start the conversation — it's easier than "hey"
icebreakers.q3: Been here before or first time?

settings.title: Settings
settings.stealthModeHint: Dims the screen to minimum — use the app without drawing attention
settings.faqHint: Answers to the most common questions
settings.guidelinesHint: Our rules for keeping EyesTalk safe and fun for everyone
settings.signOutHint: You'll need to sign in again to use the app
settings.deleteHint: Permanently delete your account and all associated data

onboarding.step1Desc: See what's happening at bars, clubs, and hangout spots near you
onboarding.step2Desc: See who's around and what they're up for — all anonymous until you connect
onboarding.step3Desc: Send a wave, break the ice, and start a conversation in seconds
onboarding.step4Desc: Participate in venue activities — karaoke bids, games, and challenges

match.title: It's a Match! 👀
match.subtitle: You're both at {{venue}}
match.hint: You both waved at each other — start a conversation!

qrScan.title: Scan to Check In
qrScan.hint: Point your camera at the QR code at the venue entrance or on your table
qrScan.error: Couldn't verify your presence — are you at the venue?
qrScan.retryHint: Make sure you're at the venue and try scanning again

people.title: People Here
people.emptyHint: You're the first! Others will appear as they check in
people.waveSentHint: If they wave back, you'll get a match and can start chatting
people.longPressHint: Long press on a person to report or block

activities.title: Activities
activities.emptyHint: Activities will appear when the venue or other users start them
activities.joinHint: Join to participate — some activities cost tokens

types.poll: Poll — vote and see what everyone thinks
types.contest: Contest — compete for tokens and bragging rights
types.challenge: Challenge — dare someone to do something fun
types.quest: Quest — complete tasks to earn rewards
